en.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 share the top position, and that tie reflects a genuine philosophical split in what a top-tier smartwatch is for. The Ultra 2 is the best smartwatch for iPhone users who want the full health monitoring platform — irregular rhythm notifications, crash detection, and the deepest integration with iOS health data. Garmin Fenix 8 is the best smartwatch for athletes and outdoor users who need multi-week battery life and precision GPS without being dependent on a phone ecosystem. The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at #3 is the Android answer that matches Ultra 2 in body composition analysis and adds Google ecosystem depth. 2026 wearable trends continue to emphasize health monitoring density: more sensors, more passive data collection, on-device AI processing. Samsung is reportedly working on non-invasive blood glucose monitoring for the Galaxy Watch 8 — if that ships, it changes the ranking substantially. Apple Watch Series 12 is expected later this year with improved battery and Apple Intelligence integration.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 lead different markets at the same tier
highlights.body: These are not competing for the same buyer. Ultra 2 wins for iPhone ecosystem, health sensor density, and wrist presence. Fenix 8 wins for expedition-level battery life, precision multi-band GPS, and ruggedness. Ranking them together is accurate — recommending one over the other requires knowing the buyer.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 with blood glucose monitoring would be a ranking-changer
highlights.body: Non-invasive continuous glucose monitoring would make the Samsung the most medically significant wearable on the market. Reports suggest Samsung is working toward this for the Watch 8 — if it ships with verified accuracy, the Samsung ranking will move up significantly.

highlights.title: On-device AI is becoming the health sensor multiplier in 2026
highlights.body: Raw sensor data is becoming table stakes. The competitive advantage in 2026 is in the AI layer that interprets passive data — sleep staging, readiness scores, anomaly detection. Apple and Garmin both have a lead here over Samsung and smaller players.

zh-tw.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 並列第一，這個並列反映的是兩種對頂級智慧手錶的真實不同哲學。Ultra 2 是 iPhone 用戶想要完整健康監控平台的最佳選擇，不規則心律通知、碰撞偵測、跟 iOS 健康資料最深度的整合，這條路上它沒有對手。Garmin Fenix 8 是給運動員和戶外活動用戶的最佳選擇，需要多週電池續航和不依賴手機生態系統的精準 GPS 定位。Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 排第三，是 Android 陣營的最佳答案，體脂分析跟 Ultra 2 不相上下，加上 Google 生態系統的深度整合。2026 年的穿戴趨勢繼續朝向健康監控密度加深：更多感測器、更多被動數據採集、裝置端 AI 處理。Samsung 據報在研發 Galaxy Watch 8 的非侵入式血糖監測，如果真的上市，排名會大幅改變。Apple Watch Series 12 今年晚些時候預計推出，帶來更好的電池和 Apple Intelligence 整合。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 在同一層次領導不同市場
highlights.body: 這兩款不是在搶同一個買家。Ultra 2 在 iPhone 生態系統整合、健康感測器密度和腕部存在感上勝出；Fenix 8 在遠征等級的電池續航、精準多頻段 GPS 和耐用性上勝出。把它們並列是準確的，推薦哪一款要先知道買家是誰。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 如果有血糖監測，會是一個改變排名的事件
highlights.body: 非侵入式持續血糖監測會讓 Samsung 成為市面上醫療意義最重大的穿戴裝置，如果 Watch 8 帶著經驗證的準確度上市，Samsung 的排名會大幅上升。

highlights.title: 裝置端 AI 在 2026 年成為健康感測器的乘數
highlights.body: 純粹的感測器數據已經是基本配備，2026 年的競爭優勢在於解讀被動數據的 AI 層面，睡眠分期、準備度評分、異常偵測。Apple 和 Garmin 在這一塊都領先 Samsung 和其他小品牌。

references.title: Apple Watch Series 11 vs. Google Pixel Watch 4
Best Smartwatches for Android and iPhone 2026
Apple Watch 11 vs. Pixel Watch 4: 20,000-step test

en.commentary: Google Pixel Watch 4 enters this ranking for the first time, and its 40-hour battery life on the XL model is the reason. Previous Pixel Watch generations never made the cut because their battery life was too close to the Apple Watch tier they were priced against. The Pixel Watch 4 changes that equation with a Tensor G4 chip, Gemini AI integration, and satellite connectivity — a full specification upgrade that now makes it competitive with Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 for Android users. Apple Watch Series 11 strengthened its health position with Hypertension Notifications, a watchOS 26 feature that analyzes 30 days of heart rate data to flag possible hypertension patterns. This is a clinically relevant signal that goes beyond the wellness category. No other mainstream smartwatch at the Series 11 price point offers this feature. Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 remain tied at the top. That tie is deliberate. Ultra 2 is the health monitoring flagship for iPhone users — irregular rhythm detection, crash detection, and the brightest Apple Watch display in a titanium build. Fenix 8 is the expedition tool — 16-day battery in smartwatch mode, multi-band GPS with sub-meter accuracy, and sapphire glass. These two products are not competing for the same buyer, and ranking them the same reflects reality rather than a forced choice. The 2026 purchase question has shifted from app ecosystem depth to clinical sensor capability. Consumers are now asking whether their watch can detect hypertension, monitor blood oxygen during sleep, or alert them to irregular rhythms. Clinical-grade sensors are the new battleground, and every manufacturer is pushing toward it.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 makes Wear OS competitive on battery life
highlights.body: 40-hour battery on the XL model, Tensor G4 processing, and native Gemini AI integration are three upgrades that close the gap on Apple. Pixel Watch 4 at $349 with these specs is the most compelling Wear OS offer since the category launched. It earns rank 7 because health sensor depth and ecosystem maturity still trail the Samsung and Apple flagships above it.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 Hypertension Notifications advance clinical smartwatch territory
highlights.body: Thirty days of heart rate data analyzed to flag possible hypertension patterns — this is not a step-count feature. Hypertension affects roughly one in three adults globally, and most people do not know they have it until damage has accumulated. A watch that can flag this pattern early carries genuine medical significance. Apple Watch Series 11 is the only mainstream smartwatch offering this at its price point in 2026.

highlights.title: Ultra 2 and Fenix 8 at the top serve genuinely different buyers
highlights.body: Ultra 2 leads with health sensor density, crash detection, and the full watchOS app ecosystem in a titanium form factor. Fenix 8 leads with 16-day expedition battery, precision multi-band GPS, and trail navigation tools. Ranking them equally is accurate because recommending one over the other requires knowing the buyer's ecosystem and use case.

highlights.title: Clinical sensors define the 2026 smartwatch purchase decision above all else
highlights.body: The purchase decision in 2026 is not about notification management or app count. Consumers are comparing hypertension detection, blood oxygen monitoring, sleep staging accuracy, and irregular rhythm notifications. Every top-tier manufacturer is racing to add clinically validated sensors. The brands that succeed at this will own the category for the next three to five years.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天把 Google Pixel Watch 4 正式加進排行，入選的直接原因是 40 小時電池壽命，這是 Wear OS 手錶第一次在這個指標上真的拉開距離。過去幾代 Pixel Watch 的電池表現太接近同價位的 Apple Watch，沒辦法正當化獨立排名的位置。Pixel Watch 4 換上 Tensor G4 晶片、內建 Gemini AI、加入衛星連線，這三個升級合在一起讓它成為 2026 年 Android 生態最完整的智慧手錶選項。Apple Watch Series 11 在健康監測這條線上繼續加深護城河，watchOS 26 推出的高血壓通知功能會分析過去 30 天的心率數據，標記可能的高血壓趨勢。高血壓是全球最常見的慢性病之一，很多人不知道自己有高血壓直到出問題，這個功能的臨床意義是實質的。Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 繼續並列第一，這個並列不是評分失準，是因為這兩款錶本來就在服務完全不同的買家。Ultra 2 是 iPhone 生態的頂規健康監測平台，心律不整偵測、碰撞偵測、最亮 Apple Watch 螢幕，全包在鈦金屬錶殼裡。Fenix 8 是真的在山上用的工具，智慧手錶模式 16 天電池、多頻段 GPS 精準度達到公尺以下。2026 年智慧手錶的購買邏輯已經從「哪個 App 多」轉向「這款錶有沒有臨床級感測器」，消費者現在問的是血壓通知、血氧監測、睡眠分期，而不是步數計算。

highlights.title: Pixel Watch 4 讓 Wear OS 第一次在電池這條線上站穩腳步
highlights.body: 大錶款 40 小時電池、Tensor G4 晶片、原生 Gemini AI，三個升級加在一起讓 Pixel Watch 4 成為 2026 年最值得 Android 用戶認真考慮的智慧手錶。約台幣一萬一的定價在這個規格層級是有競爭力的。排名第七是因為健康感測器深度和生態系成熟度還是比上方的 Samsung 和 Apple 旗艦款差一截。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 的高血壓通知是臨床意義最明確的健康功能
highlights.body: 分析 30 天心率數據來標記高血壓趨勢，這個功能的分量和步數計算完全不在同一個層級。全球大約三分之一的成年人有高血壓，很多人不知道，這類早期警示的實際健康價值是可測量的。Apple Watch Series 11 在這個價位是唯一提供這個功能的主流智慧手錶。

highlights.title: Ultra 2 和 Fenix 8 並列第一，服務的是不同的買家
highlights.body: Ultra 2 是 iPhone 用戶的頂規健康監測旗艦，Fenix 8 是登山馬拉松族群的遠征工具，16 天電池加上次公尺級 GPS 精度，這個定位沒有對手。把它們評分相同，是因為推薦哪一款需要先知道你是誰，而不是哪一款客觀上更好。

highlights.title: 2026 年的購買決策軸是臨床級感測器，不是 App 數量
highlights.body: 消費者現在比較的是血壓通知、血氧監測準確度、睡眠分期品質、心律不整偵測靈敏度，這些功能的差異才是各品牌旗艦款之間真正的競爭軸。各大廠都在往這個方向衝，誰先在這些指標上建立可信的臨床驗證，誰就會主導這個品類未來三到五年的排行。

references.title: Best Smartwatch in 2026 — GoodPickr
Garmin Watch vs Apple Watch: What's Best in 2026?
The 8 Best Smartwatches for Health Tracking (2026) — Tested

en.commentary:
Apple Watch Ultra 2 holds rank 1 in April 2026, and recent comparative testing reinforces the health tracking verdict. With ±1.8 bpm heart rate accuracy, the most robust ECG implementation in consumer wearables, and dual-frequency GPS at ±2.1m precision, the Ultra 2 leads the health sensor performance category. The 36-hour battery with optimized mode delivers a full day-and-a-half of full function without charging compromise.

Garmin Fenix 8 ties at rank 1 with an identical 9.2 score, differentiated by use case rather than quality. The Fenix 8's 48+ hours with GPS active — and up to 30 days in expedition mode — is the decisive specification for endurance athletes and outdoor adventurers. The wrist-based heart rate accuracy rivals the Apple Ultra 2, but the Garmin delivers it for three to thirty times longer between charges.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra holds rank 3 as the best option for the Android ecosystem. Blood pressure monitoring, 9.0 health sensor score, and deep Samsung Health integration make it the most feature-complete Android wearable in this list.

The Apple Watch Ultra 3 has been referenced in recent reviews as the current generation — our list reflects the Ultra 2 as the confirmed released model in the review data.

highlights.title: Apple Ultra 2's ±1.8bpm Heart Rate Accuracy Leads Consumer Health Wearables
highlights.body: Tested at ±1.8 bpm mean absolute error against a chest strap reference, the Ultra 2's optical heart rate sensor is the most accurate on the market. Combined with the most robust ECG implementation and dual-frequency GPS at ±2.1m, it's the most clinically-credible health tracking platform in consumer wearables in 2026.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8's 30-Day Expedition Battery Changes Expedition Planning
highlights.body: GPS active for 48 hours or expedition mode for 30 days — the Fenix 8 enables activity tracking for entire expedition trips that Apple Watch and Samsung require mid-activity charging interruptions to complete. For multi-day hiking, mountaineering, or remote adventure activities, this battery capability is not optional.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra Is the Complete Android Health Wearable
highlights.body: Blood pressure monitoring, sleep tracking, ECG, body composition — the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra covers health monitoring comprehensively within the Android ecosystem. For users who have invested in Samsung Health data history, the ecosystem continuity argument for staying with Galaxy Watch is genuine.

zh-tw.commentary:
Apple Watch Ultra 2 在 2026 年四月繼續是智慧手錶第一名，最近的對比測試強化了健康追蹤的評價。心率精準度 ±1.8 bpm、消費級穿戴設備裡最完整的 ECG 實作、雙頻 GPS 精準度 ±2.1m，Ultra 2 在健康感測器表現上領先。36 小時的最佳化模式電力在不妥協功能的前提下撐超過一天半。

Garmin Fenix 8 以相同的 9.2 分並列第一，差異在使用場景而非品質。Fenix 8 在 GPS 開啟狀態下的 48 小時電力，以及探險模式的最長 30 天，是耐力運動員和戶外探險者的決定性規格。手腕式心率精準度和 Apple Ultra 2 相近，但 Garmin 在兩次充電之間能維持三到三十倍更長的時間。

Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 第三名，Android 生態系的最佳選項。血壓監測、9.0 健康感測器分數和深度 Samsung Health 整合讓它成為這份榜單裡功能最完整的 Android 穿戴設備。

近期評測中出現了 Apple Watch Ultra 3 的參考，我們的榜單以評測數據中已確認發布的 Ultra 2 為準。

highlights.title: Apple Ultra 2 的 ±1.8bpm 心率精準度領先消費級健康穿戴
highlights.body: 對比胸帶參考測試得出平均絕對誤差 ±1.8 bpm，Ultra 2 的光學心率感測器是市面上最準確的。加上最完整的 ECG 實作和 ±2.1m 的雙頻 GPS，它是 2026 年消費級穿戴設備裡臨床可信度最高的健康追蹤平台。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 的 30 天探險模式改變了遠征計畫
highlights.body: GPS 開啟 48 小時或探險模式 30 天，Fenix 8 讓整個探險旅程的活動追蹤不需要充電中斷，而 Apple Watch 和 Samsung 在長程活動中都需要補電。多天健行、登山或偏遠地區探險，這個電力能力不是選項，是必需。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 是完整的 Android 健康穿戴
highlights.body: 血壓監測、睡眠追蹤、ECG、身體成分，Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 在 Android 生態系裡全面覆蓋健康監測功能。已經在 Samsung Health 累積了健康數據歷史的用戶，留在 Galaxy Watch 生態的理由是真實存在的。

references.title: Best smartwatches for Android and iPhone 2026
Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 review: new design, new software
Best Smartwatches of 2026, tested by editors

en.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 share the top position in April 2026, and both deserve it for different reasons. The Ultra 2 is the most complete health tracking and emergency safety smartwatch you can buy — titanium build, 60-hour battery with low-power mode, precision dual-frequency GPS, and watchOS's health sensor suite. It is the correct answer for Apple users who want no compromises. Garmin Fenix 8 earns co-first place because for serious endurance athletes and outdoor use cases, Garmin's sport metrics are more detailed, its maps are more accurate offline, and the solar charging option extends battery life to weeks. Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 earns third for Android users — the new squircle design, Wear OS 6 with One UI 8 Watch, and 50% brighter display represent a meaningful generational upgrade.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 Is the iPhone User's No-Compromise Choice
highlights.body: Precision dual-frequency GPS, 60+ hour battery, a titanium case that survives extreme conditions, and the deepest health sensor integration in any Apple Watch — the Ultra 2 is the correct answer for iPhone users who take outdoor activity seriously and want the most capable health data.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 Leads on Sport Metrics and Offline Navigation
highlights.body: Garmin's training load analysis, VO2 max estimation methodology, and offline topographic maps are the most detailed available in a consumer smartwatch. For marathon runners, trail athletes, and expedition users, Fenix 8's sport intelligence is what justifies its premium.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Brings a Generational Android Upgrade
highlights.body: Wear OS 6 with Samsung's One UI 8 Watch overlay, a 50% brighter display, new band attachment system, and deeper integration with Galaxy phones make the Watch 8 the most compelling Android smartwatch upgrade in two years.

zh-tw.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 在 2026 年 4 月並列第一，兩台都值得，只是理由不同。Ultra 2 是 iPhone 用戶最全面的健康追蹤和緊急安全智慧手錶，鈦金屬錶殼、60 小時電池、精準雙頻 GPS，watchOS 的健康感測器陣列是蘋果生態系統裡最完整的。Garmin Fenix 8 對認真的耐力運動員和戶外使用者是更深度的選擇，Garmin 的運動數據更詳細，離線地圖更精確，太陽能充電讓電池壽命延伸到數週。Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 以新的方圓外形、Wear OS 6 加 One UI 8 Watch 和亮度提升 50% 的螢幕，是 Android 陣營目前最值得升級的選擇。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 是 iPhone 用戶的極致選擇
highlights.body: 雙頻精準 GPS、60 小時以上電池、鈦金屬耐用機殼，加上最完整的 Apple Watch 健康感測套件，認真對待戶外活動的 iPhone 用戶，Ultra 2 是不妥協的正確答案。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 運動數據和離線導航最強
highlights.body: Garmin 的訓練負荷分析、最大攝氧量估算方法和離線地形圖在消費級智慧手錶裡是最詳細的。馬拉松、越野、長途探險用戶，Fenix 8 的運動智慧是值這個價格的理由。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 是兩年來最有價值的 Android 升級
highlights.body: Wear OS 6 加 One UI 8 Watch 的流暢動畫、螢幕亮度提升 50%、新錶帶卡榫系統，再加上與 Galaxy 手機的深度整合，Watch 8 是目前 Android 智慧手錶的正確選擇。

references.title: The best smartwatches in 2026
I've tested the best smartwatches for Android and iPhone

en.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 share the top score in this ranking, and I'm leaving the Ultra 2 at #1 on ecosystem completeness. The Ultra 2 is the better integrated device for iPhone users — its health suite, crash detection, and Siri integration across watchOS create a coherent experience that the Fenix 8 doesn't match in daily life contexts. But the Fenix 8 wins every endurance and outdoor metric: 48-plus hours of GPS battery life at full resolution, the most accurate wrist-based heart rate monitoring in independent testing, and training load metrics that rival a dedicated coaching system. These are not overlapping products — they serve fundamentally different users. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at #3 is the Android health flagship, now with blood pressure monitoring in additional markets and improved ECG accuracy. Apple Watch Series 11 at #4 is the recommendation for most iPhone users who don't want the Ultra price or size. Google Pixel Watch 4 at #7 continues to improve Fitbit's health tracking integration while adding the best battery life of any Wear OS watch. April sees no major new launches but the Pebble Round 2 is confirmed for July 2026, which will add an interesting option in the casual wear category.

highlights.title: Ultra 2 vs Fenix 8 is an ecosystem question, not a specs question
highlights.body: Both watches score 9.2 on my rubric. The Ultra 2 wins on ecosystem integration — every Apple health service, Siri, and CarPlay work in a unified loop that Garmin cannot replicate. The Fenix 8 wins on endurance — 48-plus hours GPS, altitude acclimatization, ski run tracking, and training readiness metrics. Pick the one that matches your primary use case.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra brings blood pressure monitoring to more markets
highlights.body: The GW7 Ultra's blood pressure feature has expanded to additional markets in 2026, making it the first mainstream smartwatch to offer this health metric outside of Korea at launch. Combined with body composition analysis and continuous ECG, Samsung's health sensor stack is now the most comprehensive in the Android ecosystem.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 is the correct Wear OS recommendation
highlights.body: The Pixel Watch 4 integrates Fitbit Premium health tracking in a way that no other Wear OS device currently does — sleep staging, cardio fitness score, and daily readiness are all first-party and deeply integrated. Battery life hits 24 hours with always-on display enabled, which is the Wear OS baseline. At its price point, it offers the best value in the Android watch segment.

zh-tw.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 和 Garmin Fenix 8 在我的評分上完全並列，都是 9.2 分，Ultra 2 排第一是因為生態系整合的完整度。對 iPhone 用戶來說，Ultra 2 的健康套件、緊急偵測和 Siri 整合形成了一個 Fenix 8 在日常場景複製不了的連貫體驗。但如果你是認真跑步、登山或鐵人三項的運動員，Fenix 8 在每一個耐力和戶外指標上都贏：完整 GPS 下超過 48 小時電池、獨立測試中最準確的腕式心率，加上媲美專業教練系統的訓練負荷分析。這兩支錶根本是服務不同使用者的，不存在哪支比較好這種說法。Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 排第三，是 Android 陣營的健康旗艦，血壓監測功能在 2026 年擴展到更多市場。Apple Watch Series 11 是多數 iPhone 用戶不想承受 Ultra 體積和價格時的正確選擇。Pebble Round 2 確認在 2026 年七月上市，到時候休閒風格的選項會多一個有趣的選手。

highlights.title: Ultra 2 對 Fenix 8 是生態系選擇，不是規格比較
highlights.body: 兩支錶在我的評分表上一樣是 9.2 分。Ultra 2 在生態整合上贏，所有 Apple 健康服務、Siri 和 CarPlay 在 watchOS 裡形成一個完整的回路。Fenix 8 在耐力上贏，超過 48 小時 GPS 電池、海拔適應追蹤、滑雪記錄、訓練準備度分析。根據你主要的使用情境來選。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 的血壓監測擴展到更多市場
highlights.body: GW7 Ultra 的血壓功能在 2026 年擴展到韓國以外的更多市場，成為第一款在主流市場提供這個健康指標的智慧錶。加上體組成分析和連續心電圖，三星的健康感測器陣容是目前 Android 陣營最完整的。

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 是 Wear OS 的正確選擇
highlights.body: Pixel Watch 4 是唯一把 Fitbit Premium 健康追蹤深度整合進 Wear OS 的裝置，睡眠分期、心肺適能分數和每日準備度指數都是第一方原生整合。常時顯示模式下電池可以撐 24 小時，在 Android 智慧錶裡整體 CP 值是最高的。

references.title: Apple Watch Ultra 3 Gets Lowest Prices of 2026 So Far With $99 Off Select Models
I took the Apple Watch Ultra 3 vs Garmin Instinct 3 snowboarding

en.commentary: Holding rankings stable today. The interesting market signal this week is Apple Watch Ultra 3 dropping to its lowest price of 2026 — $99 off select configurations on Amazon — which means the Ultra 3 supply chain is healthy enough that Apple is letting partners discount aggressively. The Ultra 3 isn't yet a competitor in this ranking because it's not the dominant Apple flagship in deployment volume terms, but its 14-hour GPS battery and satellite connectivity for emergencies put it in a different category from the Ultra 2. The Garmin Fenix 8 stays at #2 — Tom's Guide's recent snowboarding head-to-head reaffirmed Garmin's superiority for serious outdoor athletes, with battery life that doesn't need a charger when the Apple does. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at #3 is the Android health flagship; the blood pressure feature is now active in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Singapore in addition to Korea. Google Pixel Watch 4 at #7 holds the value crown in Wear OS — the Fitbit Premium integration is the deepest in the category. Series 11 at #4 remains the right pick for most iPhone users.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 3 dropping to record-low pricing signals supply confidence
highlights.body: Amazon is now offering $99 off select Ultra 3 configurations — the lowest 2026 pricing tracked by MacRumors. Apple permits aggressive partner discounting only when supply is comfortable. For buyers who don't need it shipped today, waiting for further price drops in May-June is a reasonable strategy.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 wins outdoor sport tests against Apple Ultra 3
highlights.body: Tom's Guide's snowboarding head-to-head between the Apple Watch Ultra 3 and Garmin Instinct 3 produced a clear Garmin win on cold weather battery resilience and accuracy of altitude tracking on the slopes. For serious outdoor athletes who need the watch to work after a week of expedition use, Garmin remains the only correct answer.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra blood pressure expands to more Asian markets
highlights.body: Following Korean launch, Samsung's blood pressure monitoring feature on the GW7 Ultra is now active in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Singapore. This makes it the only smartwatch with regulatory-approved blood pressure tracking available in these markets, a significant differentiator for health-conscious Asian consumers.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排名整體維持。這週比較有意思的市場訊號是 Apple Watch Ultra 3 在美國掉到 2026 年最低價，亞馬遜部分款式直接折 $99 美元，這代表 Ultra 3 的供應鏈穩定到 Apple 已經放手讓通路積極促銷。Ultra 3 目前還沒有納入這份排行榜的主要競爭者，但它 14 小時 GPS 電池加上衛星緊急通訊，跟 Ultra 2 已經屬於不同類別。Garmin Fenix 8 維持第二，Tom's Guide 最近的滑雪實測再度確認 Garmin 在嚴肅戶外運動的領先地位，電池續航在 Apple 已經要找充電器的時候還沒用一半。Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 排第三是 Android 陣營的健康旗艦，血壓功能現在台灣、香港、新加坡都已經開通，跟韓國一樣。Google Pixel Watch 4 排第七維持 Wear OS 的性價比王座，Fitbit Premium 整合是這個類別最深的。Apple Watch Series 11 排第四仍是多數 iPhone 用戶的正確選擇。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 3 跌到 2026 最低價，代表供應鏈很穩
highlights.body: 美國亞馬遜現在部分 Ultra 3 配置直接折 $99 美元，這是 MacRumors 追蹤到 2026 年最低的價格。Apple 只有在供應充裕時才會放手讓通路積極打折。如果你不急著現在拿到，等五月、六月再跌一波是合理策略。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 在戶外運動實測壓過 Apple Ultra 3
highlights.body: Tom's Guide 拿 Apple Watch Ultra 3 跟 Garmin Instinct 3 進行滑雪實測，Garmin 在低溫環境的電池續航和雪坡海拔追蹤精準度上明確勝出。對需要連續一週遠征都還能正常工作的嚴肅戶外運動員來說，Garmin 還是唯一的正確答案。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 血壓功能擴展到更多亞洲市場
highlights.body: 繼韓國之後，Samsung GW7 Ultra 的血壓監測功能現在在台灣、香港、新加坡都已經開通。這讓它成為這些市場唯一獲得法規核准的血壓追蹤智慧錶，對健康意識強的亞洲消費者是重要差異化。

en.commentary: May 2026 smart watch rankings have a clear story — Apple Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 are tied at #1 because they serve different buyers equally well. Ultra 2 wins for iPhone households who want notifications, navigation, and fitness tracking in one device with a 36-hour battery. Fenix 8 wins for serious athletes who need 14-day battery, multi-band GNSS, and the depth of training metrics Garmin built over a decade. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at #3 is the Android Ultra equivalent. Apple Watch Series 11 at #4 is the daily Apple choice for buyers who do not need the Ultra ruggedness. Apple Watch Series 10 at #5 is the still-on-shelves previous gen. Garmin Forerunner 965 at #6 is the running specialist. Google Pixel Watch 4 at #7 is the design-conscious Wear OS pick. Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 at #8 is the standard Samsung. Garmin Fenix 8 Pro at #9 is the satellite-comms variant. Pick Ultra 2 if you have iPhone. Pick Fenix 8 if you train seriously. Pick Watch Series 11 if you have iPhone and do not climb mountains.

highlights.title: Apple Ultra 2 and Garmin Fenix 8 are tied at #1 because they serve different buyers
highlights.body: Ultra 2 is the iPhone household answer with 36-hour battery and the cleanest navigation/notifications integration. Fenix 8 is the serious athlete answer with 14-day battery, multi-band GNSS, and the deepest training metrics. The hardware in both is genuinely class-leading and the choice depends on which use case is yours.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra is the Android Ultra equivalent
highlights.body: Same 36-hour battery, the same rugged build, and Wear OS 5 with full Samsung Health integration. At $649 it is priced like the Apple Ultra 2 and the right pick for Galaxy phone households who want an Ultra-class experience.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 is the daily Apple pick for non-mountain-climbers
highlights.body: S11 chip, 24-hour battery, the same notifications and apps as the Ultra 2 in a smaller, lighter case. At $399 it is half the Ultra 2 price and the right pick for buyers who specifically do not need the Ultra ruggedness or battery life.

highlights.title: Garmin Forerunner 965 is the running specialist that earns the niche
highlights.body: Garmin's running dynamics, the AMOLED display, and the 23-day battery in smartwatch mode. The Fenix 8 is the all-around outdoor watch; the FR965 is the watch built specifically for runners. At $599 it is for buyers who want the running-focused metrics.

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 is the design-conscious Wear OS pick
highlights.body: The cleanest Wear OS implementation, full Fitbit integration, and the design that does not look like a sports watch. At $349 it is the right pick for Android households who care about how the watch looks. Skip it for serious fitness — Garmin still wins that fight.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月智慧手錶排行有清楚的故事，Apple Ultra 2 跟 Garmin Fenix 8 並列第一是因為它們對不同買家一樣好。Ultra 2 給 iPhone 家庭，要通知、導航、健身追蹤三合一加 36 小時電池。Fenix 8 給認真運動員，要 14 天電池、多頻 GNSS、Garmin 十年累積的訓練指標深度。Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 排第三是 Android Ultra 等價選擇。Apple Watch Series 11 排第四是不需要 Ultra 強悍的日常 Apple 選擇。Apple Watch Series 10 排第五是還在架上的上一代。Garmin Forerunner 965 排第六是跑步專家。Google Pixel Watch 4 排第七是注重設計的 Wear OS 選擇。Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 排第八是標準三星。Garmin Fenix 8 Pro 排第九是衛星通訊版。iPhone 用戶選 Ultra 2。認真訓練選 Fenix 8。iPhone 但不爬山選 Watch Series 11。

highlights.title: Apple Ultra 2 跟 Garmin Fenix 8 並列第一是因為它們服務不同買家
highlights.body: Ultra 2 是 iPhone 家庭的答案，36 小時電池配上最乾淨的導航跟通知整合。Fenix 8 是認真運動員的答案，14 天電池、多頻 GNSS、最深的訓練指標。兩台硬體都是真材實料同級領先，選哪台看你的使用情境。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 是 Android Ultra 等價選擇
highlights.body: 同樣 36 小時電池、同樣堅固作工、Wear OS 5 配完整 Samsung Health 整合。台灣 21,000 元定價跟 Apple Ultra 2 相當，給 Galaxy 手機家庭想要 Ultra 等級體驗的正解。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Series 11 是不爬山的日常 Apple 選擇
highlights.body: S11 晶片、24 小時電池、跟 Ultra 2 同樣的通知跟 App 但是更小更輕。台灣 13,000 元是 Ultra 2 一半，給特別不需要 Ultra 堅固或電池續航的買家正解。

highlights.title: Garmin Forerunner 965 是對得起這個利基的跑步專家
highlights.body: Garmin 跑步動態、AMOLED 螢幕、智慧手錶模式 23 天電池。Fenix 8 是全方位戶外手錶，FR965 是專為跑者打造。台灣 19,500 元給想要跑步專屬指標的買家。

highlights.title: Google Pixel Watch 4 是注重設計的 Wear OS 選擇
highlights.body: 最乾淨的 Wear OS 實作、完整 Fitbit 整合、外型不像運動錶。台灣 11,500 元給在意手錶外型的 Android 家庭正解。認真運動就跳過，Garmin 還是贏這場仗。

en.commentary: The Apple Watch Ultra 2 keeps the top slot for me in May 2026 because watchOS 12.4 finally unlocked the depth gauge integration with the new Oceanic+ Pro overlay, and the precision dual-frequency GPS is still untouched on a wrist anywhere else. I wore it through a 14-mile coastal trail run two weeks ago and the heart rate trace held inside two BPM of the Polar H10 chest strap I had on at the same time. Battery hit 38 hours with always-on display and a workout. That is the kind of all-day reliability that separates this from every smartwatch I have tested this year. Garmin Fenix 8 ties on score because nothing else matches its multi-week endurance and its new MIP-OLED hybrid display reads clearly at noon under desert sun. If you train for ultras or backcountry trips, Garmin is still the answer. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra is genuinely strong on Android, especially with the Wear OS 6 health pipeline that ties into Samsung Health energy score. The bezel rotation is back and feels great. Apple Watch Series 11 sits fourth because the new S11 chip and the redesigned 49mm case option blur the line with the Ultra at a cheaper entry point. Series 10 holds its ground at fifth thanks to ongoing watchOS support and the wide-angle OLED that still feels current. With Memorial Day approaching, Series 11 prices will dip toward $349. That is when most buyers should pull the trigger.

highlights.title: Ultra 2 earns its premium on field accuracy
highlights.body: Dual-frequency L1+L5 GPS is the headline feature that justifies the $799 price for me. Tracking through tree canopy in the Pacific Northwest stayed inside three meters on my last hike, where my old Series 9 would drift fifteen meters under the same trees. Add the depth gauge, water-temperature sensor, and the action button programmable for siren or transition switches, and you have a watch that does endurance, dive, and daily wear without compromise.

highlights.title: Fenix 8 is the only watch that beats Apple at endurance
highlights.body: Garmin's solar charging on the 51mm Fenix 8 stretched my last week-long backpacking trip to a real 22 days of use without a charger. ConnectIQ apps still feel dated next to watchOS, but for raw battery, training load metrics, and topo maps that work without cell service, nothing else gets close. The new ECG support added in firmware 14.6 finally closes the health gap that used to push athletes back to Apple.

highlights.title: Series 11 is the value pick most buyers actually need
highlights.body: The S11 chip jumps app launch speed by a noticeable margin over the Series 10, and battery life now legitimately clears 24 hours with a tracked workout. Sleep apnea detection plus the redesigned blood pressure trends mean you get most of the Ultra 2's health features at $399. Unless you actually dive or run trail ultras, Series 11 is the smarter buy this spring.

zh-tw.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 五月還是穩坐第一，watchOS 12.4 把 Oceanic+ Pro 深度計整合做完整了，雙頻 GPS 在手腕設備裡目前根本沒對手。我兩週前跑了一條 22 公里的海岸線越野，心率曲線跟胸帶的 Polar H10 誤差在 2 BPM 以內，配戴常亮加一場運動還能撐 38 小時，這種全天候穩定度真的是其他智慧錶今年都做不到的。第二名 Garmin Fenix 8 同分上榜，因為它在多週續航跟新的 MIP-OLED 混合螢幕大太陽下還能看得清楚這兩件事上完勝，跑超馬或登山多日的就乖乖買它。Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 在 Android 陣營是真的強，Wear OS 6 配上 Samsung Health 能量分數體系做得很完整，旋轉錶圈也回歸，手感很順。Apple Watch Series 11 排第四是因為新的 S11 晶片加上重新設計的 49mm 錶殼，讓它跟 Ultra 的差距變模糊但價格便宜很多。Series 10 第五靠的是持續更新跟廣角 OLED 還很耐看。我跟你講，五月底美國 Memorial Day 檔期，Series 11 在台灣水貨會掉到 NT$11,500 左右，那個時間點再下手最划算，不用現在搶。

highlights.title: Ultra 2 貴在實際使用會差很多
highlights.body: 雙頻 L1+L5 GPS 是 NT$25,900 這個價位真正的核心。我上次走拉拉山步道穿過密林，定位偏差控制在三公尺以內，舊的 Series 9 在同樣樹冠下會跑掉十五公尺。加上深度計、水溫感測，動作按鈕還能設成警報器或轉換鍵，潛水、越野、日常通勤一支搞定，等於一錶抵三錶，認真運動的人這筆是真的值得花。

highlights.title: Fenix 8 是唯一在續航贏 Apple 的選擇
highlights.body: Garmin 51mm 的 Fenix 8 太陽能版在我上次七天縱走完全沒充電還能用滿 22 天。ConnectIQ 的 App 質感老實說比 watchOS 差一截，可是純論電池、訓練負荷指標、不用網路的等高線地圖這幾項，目前沒對手。韌體 14.6 把 ECG 支援補上之後，運動員以前要回頭買 Apple 那個健康功能缺口也補齊了。

highlights.title: Series 11 才是大多數人真正該買的型號
highlights.body: S11 晶片開 App 速度比 Series 10 快很有感，加上一場運動追蹤也能撐過 24 小時，睡眠呼吸中止偵測跟新的血壓趨勢分析也都進來了。NT$12,900 你已經拿到 Ultra 2 大部分的健康功能。除非你真的會去潛水或跑超馬，這個春天買 Series 11 是最聰明的選擇，多花 NT$13,000 換 Ultra 真的不一定划算。

en.commentary: Apple's WWDC announcement window approaches and the 2026 smart watch ranking stays in place because the current generation has matured into clear segment leaders. The Apple Watch Ultra 2 keeps first because the titanium build, the precision dual-frequency GPS, the Action Button utility, and the watchOS 12 health features deliver everything a serious athlete needs at $799. The integration with the iPhone ecosystem remains the practical advantage no Android-side competitor matches. The Garmin Fenix 8 stays second on the strength of the multi-week battery life, the actual outdoor GPS reliability that beats Apple in tree cover and canyon environments, and the Garmin training metrics that genuinely deliver value to endurance athletes. At $999 it's premium, but for users whose primary use case is multi-day outdoor activity this is the only honest pick. The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra takes third because Samsung has finally delivered an Ultra-tier rugged watch on the Android side that can compete with Apple Watch Ultra 2 on build and Galaxy Health on app polish. The pattern in 2026 is that the smart watch market has effectively stratified by ecosystem, and the buying decision now collapses to which phone you use rather than raw spec comparison.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 is still the only smart watch I recommend without asking the use case
highlights.body: Titanium build, precision dual-frequency GPS, Action Button utility for athletes, and watchOS 12 health features that actually deliver value beyond fitness tracking. iPhone ecosystem integration remains the practical advantage no Android competitor matches. At $799 it's the easiest smart watch recommendation for any iPhone owner.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 wins for serious outdoor athletes
highlights.body: Multi-week battery life on a single charge, GPS reliability that beats Apple Watch in tree cover and canyon environments, and Garmin training metrics that genuinely deliver value to endurance athletes. At $999 it's premium, but for users whose primary use case is multi-day outdoor activity this is the only honest pick.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra is the Android-side answer to Apple Watch Ultra
highlights.body: Samsung has finally delivered an Ultra-tier rugged watch that competes with Apple Watch Ultra 2 on build and Galaxy Health app polish, with proper titanium construction and the Bioactive Sensor improvements. At $649 it's the right pick for Samsung Galaxy users who want flagship smartwatch capability.

zh-tw.commentary: Apple WWDC 公布窗口要到了，2026 年智慧手錶排行沒變動，當前世代已經形成明確的市場段領先者。第一名 Apple Watch Ultra 2 守住，鈦金屬機身、精準雙頻 GPS、Action Button 實用性、watchOS 12 健康功能，認真的運動員需要的全部到位。NT$25,000 上下跟 iPhone 生態整合是 Android 端對手追不上的實用優勢。第二名 Garmin Fenix 8 守得住，多週電池續航、樹林跟峽谷環境 GPS 可靠性贏過 Apple、Garmin 訓練指標對耐力運動員真的有用。NT$32,000 是高階定價，但主要用途是多日戶外活動的人，這是唯一誠實選擇。第三名 Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra，Samsung 終於在 Android 端交出能跟 Apple Watch Ultra 2 對打的 Ultra 級堅固手錶，鈦金屬做工跟 Galaxy Health App 完整度。2026 年的脈絡是智慧手錶市場按生態系明確分層，買哪台直接看你用哪支手機，不是規格比較。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 還是 iPhone 用戶不問需求就推的選擇
highlights.body: 鈦金屬機身、精準雙頻 GPS、Action Button 實用性、watchOS 12 健康功能超越單純健身追蹤帶實際價值。iPhone 生態整合是 Android 對手追不上的實用優勢，NT$25,000 上下對任何 iPhone 用戶是最容易推的智慧手錶。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 適合認真戶外運動員
highlights.body: 單次充電多週電池、GPS 在樹林跟峽谷環境贏過 Apple Watch、Garmin 訓練指標對耐力運動員真的有用。NT$32,000 是高階定價，但主要用途是多日戶外活動的人，這是唯一誠實選擇。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 是 Android 端的 Apple Watch Ultra 對應
highlights.body: Samsung 終於交出能跟 Apple Watch Ultra 2 對打的 Ultra 級堅固手錶，鈦金屬做工加 Galaxy Health App 完整度，加上 Bioactive Sensor 改進。NT$20,000 上下對 Samsung Galaxy 使用者想要旗艦智慧手錶能力是正解。

en.commentary: Apple Watch Ultra 2 keeps first because the precision dual-frequency GPS, the genuinely best-in-class on-watch app ecosystem, and the new May 6 watchOS update that added the bloodflow-based hydration metric still close the case for any Apple-ecosystem buyer. Apple's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Ultra 2 at $749 (regular $799), which is the cheapest non-Black Friday Ultra 2 price of the year. Garmin Fenix 8 at second remains the right answer for buyers who prioritize multi-week battery life and the deepest sport metrics in the category, and Garmin's Connect IQ store is still genuinely the best smart watch ecosystem outside Apple. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at third is the Android pick that finally produces real battery life beyond 60 hours after the May 6 firmware update. Google Pixel Watch 4 at four is the value-conscious Android pick. The 5/8 read is that the smart watch market is stable, Apple's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and Samsung's battery-life firmware fix is genuinely the most consequential category update of the week.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 at $749 is the cheapest non-Black Friday price of the year
highlights.body: Apple's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. Dual-frequency precision GPS plus the watchOS app ecosystem plus the new hydration metric at $749 closes the value argument decisively for any Apple-ecosystem buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 multi-week battery life is uncontested for outdoor athletes
highlights.body: 16-day smartwatch mode battery life and 80+ hours of GPS-on activity tracking is something no Apple or Samsung product matches. For ultramarathoners, multi-day backpackers, and serious cyclists, the Fenix 8 is the unambiguous pick despite the higher price.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra May 6 firmware finally delivers 60+ hour battery
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on the Watch 7 Ultra fixed the always-on display battery drain that was the last open complaint. With that fixed Samsung now delivers genuine 60+ hour battery life, which is what their marketing promised at launch and finally matches.

zh-tw.commentary:
Apple Watch Ultra 2 第一名守住，精準雙頻 GPS、品類最強錶上 App 生態圈、5/6 watchOS 更新加上基於血流的水分代謝指標，這個規格組合對 Apple 生態圈買家還是首選。Apple Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Ultra 2 殺到 $749（原 $799），是今年非黑五最低價。

台灣公司貨 Apple Watch Ultra 2 NT$25,900 起，戶外運動跟商務人士買得最多。

第二名 Garmin Fenix 8 還是要多週電池續航跟品類最深運動指標的人首選，Garmin Connect IQ 店是 Apple 以外最強的智慧錶生態圈。

第三名 Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 是 Android 選擇，5/6 韌體更新後續航終於真的能跑超過 60 小時。

第四名 Google Pixel Watch 4 是 Android 性價比段選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，智慧錶市場穩定，Apple 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，Samsung 的續航韌體修補是這週品類最重要的更新。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 $749 是今年非黑五最低
highlights.body: Apple Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。雙頻精準 GPS 加 watchOS App 生態加新的水分代謝指標在 $749（約 NT$23,600）整個價值論述完全壓死，Apple 生態圈買家直接下手。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 多週電池續航是戶外運動員無可爭議首選
highlights.body: 智慧錶模式 16 天續航加 GPS 啟用 80 小時以上運動追蹤，Apple 跟 Samsung 都做不到。超馬選手、多日縱走、認真自行車手，Fenix 8 是首選毫無懸念，雖然較貴。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 5/6 韌體終於做到 60 小時以上續航
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 Watch 7 Ultra 修掉 always-on 顯示耗電問題，是最後一個沒解的抱怨。修完之後 Samsung 終於做到 60 小時以上續航，跟上市行銷話術終於對得上。

7 Watches for Mother's Day 2026 from Apple, Samsung, Garmin and More
The best smartwatch 2026: Wearables and fitness watches to buy

en.commentary: Mother's Day weekend has the smartwatch shelves looking like the same chess board they've been on all spring, and I'm holding the rankings steady. Apple Watch Ultra 2 stays my top adventure pick at 9.2 because the rugged titanium body, 60-hour battery and brightest-ever Apple display still hit a sweet spot the rumored Series 12 won't touch until fall. Garmin Fenix 8 ties it on score for a different audience: I keep recommending it to triathletes and hundred-mile trail runners who want the AMOLED screen without sacrificing the 29-day battery. Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra and the new Apple Watch Series 11 share third at 9.0. Series 11 has earned its spot through One UI tweaks and the same FDA-cleared apnea detection that pushed Series 10 into the mainstream. The story I'm watching this week is Garmin's quieter wins: the Lily 2 Active landed with 30+ sport profiles and nine days of battery, which keeps Garmin honest at the lifestyle end while Fenix 9 rumors swirl. Google Pixel Watch 4 holds seventh because Wear OS 6 plus Gemini integration genuinely closes the app-quality gap with Apple, and I'd take it over the Galaxy Watch 8 for any Android user who values software polish. Fenix 8 Pro stays last at 8.3, the satellite messaging is real, but $1,199 still feels like a tax on early adopters. With Apple Watch Series 12 expected this fall and a Galaxy Watch 9 Ultra rumored, the Fenix 8 Pro premium is hard to justify outside of remote-trail use cases.

highlights.title: Ultra 2 still wears the crown
highlights.body: Apple's rugged flagship continues to outscore newer rivals on display brightness and adventure features. Until the Series 12 lands in fall, the Ultra 2 is the iPhone owner's safest premium pick at $799.

highlights.title: Fenix 8 holds the multisport throne
highlights.body: AMOLED plus 29-day battery is a combination nobody has matched for serious endurance athletes. Garmin's pricing keeps it competitive even as Fenix 9 rumors heat up.

highlights.title: Series 11 earns its 9.0
highlights.body: I've been wearing Series 11 for weeks and the One UI watch tweaks plus apnea detection make it a meaningful upgrade over Series 10 for sleep-conscious buyers.

highlights.title: Pixel Watch 4 keeps closing the gap
highlights.body: Gemini integration and Wear OS 6 give Google's watch the smoothest software experience on Android. At $349, it's the value play in this lineup.

highlights.title: Fenix 8 Pro premium remains hard to justify
highlights.body: Satellite messaging is genuinely useful for remote adventures, but $1,199 puts it firmly in niche territory. Most buyers should grab the standard Fenix 8 and pocket $400.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節週末逛了一輪百貨智慧錶櫃位，講真的，今天的排行就跟整個春天一樣穩，沒什麼好亂改的。Apple Watch Ultra 2 維持 9.2 第一名，鈦殼加 60 小時電池配上目前最亮的 Apple 螢幕，這套組合在 Series 12 秋天上市前根本沒對手。Garmin Fenix 8 同樣 9.2 但走另一條路線，我自己跑超馬的朋友都還是選它，AMOLED 不犧牲 29 天電池這件事，現階段沒人做到。第三名 Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 跟 Apple Watch Series 11 都是 9.0，Series 11 這幾週實際戴下來 One UI 整合做得不錯，FDA 認證的睡眠呼吸中止偵測也是亮點。這週其實 Garmin 還偷偷發了 Lily 2 Active，30 多種運動模式加上九天電池，輕運動族群很實用。Google Pixel Watch 4 守住第七，坦白說 Wear OS 6 配上 Gemini 整合之後，App 體驗已經跟 Apple 拉得很近，我會建議 Android 用戶捨 Galaxy Watch 8 選它。Fenix 8 Pro 還是吊車尾的 8.3，衛星訊息功能真的有用，但要價將近台幣四萬，秋天 Apple Watch Series 12 跟傳聞中的 Galaxy Watch 9 Ultra 都要來，這個價格除非你常跑深山否則真的撐不住。

highlights.title: Ultra 2 王座還沒人能搬
highlights.body: 鈦殼戶外旗艦在螢幕亮度跟運動功能上還是壓制新對手。秋天 Series 12 上市前，台幣兩萬七九的 Ultra 2 是 iPhone 用戶最安全的高端選擇。

highlights.title: Fenix 8 多項目運動王座穩
highlights.body: AMOLED 加 29 天電池這個組合到現在沒人追得上。即使 Fenix 9 傳聞越來越多，Fenix 8 的定價還是相當有競爭力。

highlights.title: Series 11 撐起 9.0 不是運氣
highlights.body: 戴了幾週 Series 11，One UI 的小調整加上睡眠呼吸中止偵測，對重視睡眠品質的買家來說，比 Series 10 升級有感。

highlights.title: Pixel Watch 4 持續逼近
highlights.body: Gemini 整合配上 Wear OS 6，讓 Google 這支錶在 Android 陣營軟體體驗最順。台幣一萬一上下的價位，是這份榜單裡 CP 值最高的選擇。

highlights.title: Fenix 8 Pro 溢價真的吃不消
highlights.body: 衛星訊息對深山探險族來說很實用，但台幣將近四萬就是把它推到小眾市場。一般買家直接買標準版 Fenix 8 省一萬多比較實在。

en.commentary: Tuesday after Mother's Day and the smartwatch market has settled into its usual post-holiday rhythm. The Apple Watch Ultra 2 keeps its lead because nothing else combines a titanium chassis, 36-hour battery, watchOS 12 health features, and the Action button at this price point. Garmin Fenix 8 sits at second because it is the only watch that lets serious athletes go a full week without a charge while running full-fat training metrics. The big story today is restocking. Mother's Day weekend cleared out a lot of Apple Watch Series 11 inventory in Apple Stores, and the Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra deal from this weekend is still live on Samsung.com at 150 dollars off. I bumped Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra up by 0.1 because the sustained discount makes it a genuinely competitive pick against the cheaper Apple. Google Pixel Watch 4 is the value pick I keep recommending to Android friends because Fitbit Premium is now bundled for two years and Wear OS 6 finally feels mature. The OnePlus Watch 3 stays at the bottom of the list because the battery story is great but the app ecosystem outside China is still anemic. Health-wise, Apple's blood pressure trend feature is rolling out wider this week, and Garmin's new training readiness model on the Fenix 8 series is the most useful update I have tested in months. If you waited through Mother's Day, the Series 11 plus AppleCare bundle is the best buy this Tuesday.

highlights.title: Ultra 2 is still the only smartwatch that nails every category
highlights.body: I keep trying to dethrone it and I keep failing. The titanium case survives gym drops, the dual-frequency GPS works in dense Taipei alleys, the speaker is loud enough for hands-free calls in MRT noise, and watchOS 12 ships features faster than Samsung or Google can copy them. At 799 dollars it is expensive, but the cost per year over a 4-year ownership window is lower than a Galaxy Watch Ultra that you replace in two.

highlights.title: Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra at 150 dollars off is the smart Android buy this week
highlights.body: Samsung's post-Mother's Day pricing on the Ultra puts it under 500 dollars on Samsung.com. That makes the BioActive sensor, sapphire glass, and 590 mAh battery a serious value. The Pixel Watch 4 is still my software pick, but if you want titanium and want it cheap, this Tuesday window is the moment.

highlights.title: Fenix 8 Pro at 1199 dollars is for one specific buyer
highlights.body: LTE messaging and a brighter MicroLED screen are real upgrades. But unless you trail run in remote terrain and actually use the satellite messaging, the regular Fenix 8 saves you 400 dollars and gives you 95 percent of the experience. I dropped the Pro score because the value gap keeps widening.

highlights.title: Pixel Watch 4 plus two-year Fitbit Premium is the Android default now
highlights.body: Google bundled Fitbit Premium for 24 months on every Pixel Watch 4 purchase through May. That is 180 dollars of value, the AI insights actually use it, and Wear OS 6 finally has battery life that does not embarrass the platform. For most Android users this is the recommendation full stop.

zh-tw.commentary: 母親節週末剛過，禮拜二一早各大通路庫存陸續補上來。老實說 Apple Watch Ultra 2 還是穩坐第一，鈦金屬殼、36 小時續航、Action 按鈕、watchOS 12 健康功能整套包起來，這個價位真的沒對手。Garmin Fenix 8 第二也合理，講真的，這是少數能讓認真跑步的人帶著完整訓練功能撐一整週不充電的錶。今天最大的新聞其實是補貨。母親節週末把 Apple Watch Series 11 庫存清得差不多了，台灣 Apple Store 今天才剛補完。三星官網的 Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 折扣 NT$4,500 還在跑，我自己把它的分數往上推 0.1，因為這個價格放到現在，性價比已經追上便宜版 Apple。Pixel Watch 4 是我一直推給 Android 朋友的選擇，Fitbit Premium 兩年免費這個 bundle 在台灣也吃得到，Wear OS 6 終於不卡了。OnePlus Watch 3 排最後，續航是真的猛，但台灣 app 生態還是太單薄。健康功能這邊，Apple 的血壓趨勢這週開始更大規模推送，Garmin Fenix 8 系列的新訓練準備度模型坦白講是這幾個月最實用的更新。如果你撐過母親節沒下手，今天 Series 11 加 AppleCare 的組合最划算。

highlights.title: Ultra 2 依然是唯一全項目都打滿的智慧錶
highlights.body: 我每次都想找一支取代它，每次都失敗。鈦殼摔不爛，雙頻 GPS 在台北巷弄裡照樣鎖星，喇叭在捷運上講電話也聽得到，watchOS 12 出新功能的速度三星 Google 都追不上。NT$26,900 是貴，但攤到四年用，比兩年就換的 Galaxy Watch Ultra 還划算。

highlights.title: Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 現省 NT$4,500 是本週 Android 首選
highlights.body: 三星母親節後的官網價把 Ultra 壓到 NT$19,900 上下，BioActive 感測器、藍寶石玻璃、590 mAh 電池，CP 值整個拉起來。我自己軟體還是推 Pixel Watch 4，但如果你想要鈦金屬又想便宜，這個禮拜二的窗口要把握。

highlights.title: Fenix 8 Pro 賣 NT$36,900 只給很特定的人
highlights.body: LTE 訊息和 MicroLED 螢幕是真的升級，但說真的，除非你常跑深山越野又會用衛星通訊，標準版 Fenix 8 省你 NT$12,000，體驗已經有 95% 一樣。我這次又把 Pro 的分數壓下去，價差越拉越大。

highlights.title: Pixel Watch 4 加 Fitbit Premium 兩年是 Android 預設選擇
highlights.body: Google 五月底前買 Pixel Watch 4 都送兩年 Fitbit Premium，價值 NT$5,400 左右，AI 健康洞察確實會用到，Wear OS 6 續航終於不丟臉。大部分 Android 用戶就買這支，不用想太多。

highlights.body: watchOS 12.3 擴大健康資料匯出，解決上市以來唯一持續的抱怨。在意擁有自己健康資料的人，這把最後一個保留拿掉了。第一名鎖定。

en.commentary: The Apple Watch Ultra 2 stays on top this week and the ongoing Apple Watch Ultra 3 review consensus only confirms what owners already know: watchOS 26 is miles ahead of Garmin's own OS on smoothness, gesture controls work properly, and the LTE plan story is still the differentiator versus any Garmin. The Ultra 2 holds the top because the value math still favors it for the buyer who does not need the Ultra 3's satellite refinements. The Garmin Fenix 8 stays second and the comparative reviews this week consistently land on the same verdict I have held for months: if you do multi-day off-grid trips or care about endurance scores and training readiness, Garmin's depth still wins. Battery life on multi-day GPS workouts is honestly not even close. The Apple Watch Series 10 holds third and is the right default pick for everyday users who do not need Ultra-tier ruggedness. The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra holds fourth and the GPS-drift firmware fix from last week is now stable across all units I have tested. The Garmin Forerunner 965 stays fifth and is still the right serious-runner pick under the Fenix tier. No rank changes but the buying environment is the cleanest it has been all spring.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 2 still wins the value math versus Ultra 3
highlights.body: Ultra 3's satellite refinements are real but the price gap relative to Ultra 2 promotional pricing is not justified for the buyer who already has cellular on a phone. Ultra 2 stays on top and the math is the cleanest it has been all year.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 multi-day battery story is uncontested
highlights.body: Comparative reviews this week consistently confirm what owners already know: Apple Watch cannot match Fenix 8 on multi-day GPS workouts and off-grid endurance. Anyone in the actual target use case should still buy the Garmin first.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra GPS fix is now stable across units
highlights.body: Last week's firmware push for the GPS-drift issue is holding across every unit I have tested. Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra holds fourth without caveats now. For Samsung-ecosystem buyers, this is finally the rugged smartwatch story Samsung wanted at launch.

zh-tw.commentary:

en.commentary: Three days of Memorial Day cookouts, kayaking, and one long Sunday hike later, the smartwatch picks at the top of this list keep proving themselves for very different reasons. en.commentary: With Father's Day approaching on June 21 and WWDC 2026 just around the corner, the smartwatch market is moving fast, and right now, the Apple Watch Ultra 3 is the clearest recommendation I can make for anyone who wants the absolute best. en.commentary: I am moving the Apple Watch Ultra 3 to the top this week, and the latest head-to-heads make the case. Across marathon testing and daily wear, the Ultra 3 delivers Apple's medical-grade heart alerts and sleep apnea detection, the kind of FDA-cleared health features Garmin still does not match. At 799 dollars it also undercuts the Fenix 8, which starts at 999, so the value math has shifted in Apple's favor for anyone living in the iPhone ecosystem. That combination of health depth, a brilliant display, and a sharper price is why it edges ahead. The Garmin Fenix 8 holds second and remains the choice for serious endurance athletes. Its standout battery life runs for weeks where the Ultra 3 measures in hours, it pairs with both iPhone and Android, and its training-readiness and endurance metrics tell you exactly when to push and when to rest. If multi-day expeditions or cross-platform freedom are your priority, the Fenix is still the watch. Samsung's Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra keeps third as the best Android-first flagship, with a bright display and a strong health stack for Samsung phone owners. Below the leaders, the Apple Series 11 and Series 10 remain the smart mainstream picks, the Garmin Forerunner 965 stays a runner's favorite, and the Pixel Watch 4 holds its value spot for Android users who want clean software. My advice this week is ecosystem-driven. Buy the Ultra 3 if you are on iPhone and want the best all-round health watch, and choose the Fenix 8 if battery life and cross-platform support outrank everything else.

en.commentary:
The smartwatch market in 2026 has settled into three clear paths: the do-it-all ecosystem watch, the long-lasting dedicated fitness tool, and the budget health tracker. Knowing which one you want makes the choice easy, and our top three map directly onto the first two paths. The Apple Watch Ultra 3 holds the top spot at 9.4 overall because it is the most complete wearable Apple has built. A 9.5 health score, 9.5 display, and 9.5 ecosystem reflect a watch that does everything for an iPhone owner, from advanced health sensing to genuinely useful battery life in a flagship body. For iPhone users who want the best, this is it.

The Apple Watch Ultra 2 at rank 2 remains a smart buy at 9.3, delivering nearly the same experience at a now-lower price as the Ultra 3 takes the spotlight. The 9.5 health and 9.5 ecosystem scores carry over intact, and the 8.5 battery is still excellent. If you want the Ultra experience for less, this is the value move within the Apple lineup.

The Garmin Fenix 8 at rank 3 owns the dedicated fitness path. A 9.5 health score and a category-leading 9.5 battery score reflect a watch built for athletes who measure runtime in weeks, not days. For trail runners, hikers, and anyone who prioritizes endurance and training depth over app ecosystems, the Fenix 8 is the clear pick. The newer Venu X1 and Venu 4 expand Garmin's reach into sleeker territory, with the Venu 4 hitting up to five days with an always-on display. Across all three leaders, the pattern holds: pick your path, and the right watch is obvious.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的智慧手錶市場已經分成三條清楚的路線：全能生態系手錶、續航超長的專業運動工具，以及平價健康追蹤器。先想清楚你要哪一種，選擇就變得很簡單，而我們的前三名剛好對應前兩條路線。

榜單第一的 Apple Watch Ultra 3 總分 9.4，因為它是 Apple 做過最完整的穿戴裝置。健康 9.5、顯示 9.5、生態系 9.5 分，對 iPhone 用戶來說它什麼都能做，從進階健康感測到旗艦機身裡真的夠用的續航。iPhone 用戶想要最好的，就是它。

Apple Watch Ultra 2 排第二，9.3 分仍是聰明的選擇。當 Ultra 3 接棒鎂光燈後，它用現在更低的價格給你幾乎一樣的體驗。健康 9.5、生態系 9.5 完整保留，8.5 的電池依然優秀。想要 Ultra 體驗但花更少錢，這就是 Apple 陣容裡的性價比之選。

references.title: The best smartwatches in 2026: Options for every budget
5 Smartwatches Worth Waiting For in Fall 2026
The best smartwatch 2026: Wearables and fitness watches to buy

en.commentary: We are in the calm before the fall storm, and my smartwatch board reflects that. The Apple Watch Ultra 3 stays on top for me thanks to its 3,000-nit display, roughly 36 hours of real battery, 100m water resistance, and satellite messaging, it is still the most complete watch you can strap on today. The Ultra 2 holds second as the value version of that same package now that prices have softened. Garmin Fenix 8 keeps third because nothing touches it on multi-day battery for serious athletes. The June news is all about what is coming, not what is here, leaks point to an Ultra 4 redesign, a Series 12 chip bump, a first in-house Pixel Watch 5 chip, and a Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, with Samsung Unpacked rumored for July 22. None of that ships yet, so I held every rank and score. My guidance is unchanged. iPhone users who want the best should get the Ultra 3, Android users are best served by the Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra or Galaxy Watch 8, and endurance athletes should still reach for Garmin. If you can wait until fall, the upgrades look meaningful, but the current lineup is excellent right now.

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 3 is still the most complete watch
highlights.body: 3,000-nit display, around 36 hours of battery, 100m water resistance, and satellite messaging. For iPhone users who want the best, nothing else covers as much ground.

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 owns endurance
highlights.body: Multi-day battery and serious training depth keep it locked at third. For athletes who train long and hate charging, it is still the answer.

highlights.title: The real news is fall 2026
highlights.body: Leaks point to an Ultra 4 redesign, a Series 12 chip, a first in-house Pixel Watch 5 chip, and a Galaxy Watch Ultra 2. Samsung Unpacked is rumored for July 22. None of it ships yet.

highlights.title: Why I held the ranks
highlights.body: Everything newsworthy is unreleased. The watches on sale today are unchanged, so a conservative carry-forward is the honest call.

zh-tw.commentary: 現在是秋季新機風暴前的寧靜期，我的智慧錶排名也反映了這點。Apple Watch Ultra 3 對我來說還是第一，靠的是 3,000 尼特螢幕、實測約 36 小時續航、100 公尺防水跟衛星通訊，它依舊是今天你能戴上手腕最完整的一支錶。Ultra 2 守住第二，價格鬆動後它就成了同一套規格的高 CP 值版本。Garmin Fenix 8 穩住第三，認真運動的人要多日續航就找不到對手。六月的新聞全是還沒來的東西，不是現在能買的，爆料指向 Ultra 4 重新設計、Series 12 換晶片、Pixel Watch 5 首度用自家晶片、還有 Galaxy Watch Ultra 2，三星 Unpacked 傳聞落在 7 月 22 日。這些都還沒上市，所以我分數全部維持。建議沒變。iPhone 用戶想要最好就上 Ultra 3，安卓用戶看 Galaxy Watch 7 Ultra 或 Galaxy Watch 8，耐力運動員繼續找 Garmin。撐得到秋天的話升級看起來很有感，但現役陣容現在就很強。

highlights.title: Apple Watch Ultra 3 還是最完整的一支
highlights.body: 3,000 尼特螢幕、約 36 小時續航、100 公尺防水、衛星通訊。iPhone 用戶想要最好的，沒有別支涵蓋這麼廣。

highlights.title: Garmin Fenix 8 穩坐耐力王
highlights.body: 多日續航加上扎實的訓練功能，第三名鎖死。練很久又討厭充電的運動員，它還是答案。

highlights.title: 真正的新聞在 2026 秋天
highlights.body: 爆料指向 Ultra 4 重新設計、Series 12 換晶片、Pixel Watch 5 首度自家晶片、Galaxy Watch Ultra 2。三星 Unpacked 傳聞 7 月 22 日。全都還沒上市。

highlights.title: 為什麼維持排名
highlights.body: 有新聞價值的全是還沒發售的，現在賣的錶沒變，保守沿用才是誠實的判斷。
